ATS-Bandipura.author: Manjunatha R
ATS-Bandipura.description: An informal display typeface with sharp edges and irregular thickness, inspired by elephant. Suitable for headings and display use.

ATS-Bengaluru.author: Manjunatha R
ATS-Bengaluru.description: A bitmap style font with futuristic look, built on a clear geometric grid. Perfect for LED boards, games, and digital designs.

ATS-Chikkamagaluru.author: Manjunatha R
ATS-Chikkamagaluru.description: First Kannada color font in the style of children's handwriting.

Akaya-Kanadaka.author: Vaishnavi Murthy, Juan Luis Blanco
Akaya-Kanadaka.description: An experimental display typeface for Kannada and Latin scripts, inspired by hand-written calligraphy.

AkhandKannada.author: Jonny Pinhorn, Ramakrishna Saiteja
AkhandKannada.description: A family of 8 compact mono-linear typefaces with dynamic letterforms, designed according to a modular system.

Ambarisha.author: Appaji Ambarisha Darbha
Ambarisha.description: A Unicode Kannada font with condensed look, named after actor Ambarisha. A clean condensed sans typeface with organic feel.

Anchu-Kannada.author: Arun CK
Anchu-Kannada.description: A square, edgy, sharp font for Kannada. The design is inspired by display pixels, giving it a jagged, rigid look.

Anek-Kannada.author: Vaishnavi Murthy, Maithili Shingre, Yesha Goshar
Anek-Kannada.description: A geometric sans serif typeface with variable font technology for modern multiscript design.

EkKannada.author: Taresh Vohra
EkKannada.description: Part of Ek Multi-script project, a unified type family across Indic scripts. Designed in 2018 with 7 weights. A proprietary font from Ek Type.

Ek-Kannada.author: Taresh Vohra
Ek-Kannada.description: Part of Ek Multi-script project, a unified type family across Indic scripts. Designed in 2018 with 7 weights. A proprietary font from Ek Type.

Baloo-Tamma-2.author: Divya Kowshik, Shuchita Grover, Ek Type
Baloo-Tamma-2.description: A playful display typeface with characteristic bounce, designed for headings and display use.

BandipurOne.author: John Vargas Beltran, Pria Ravichandran
BandipurOne.description: A display font for Kannada and Latin scripts.

Baraha-Kannada.author: Sheshadrivasu Chandrasekharan
Baraha-Kannada.license: Free for personal and commercial use
Baraha-Kannada.description: A Kannada transliteration font by Baraha.

BelurKannada.author: Satya Rajpurohit
BelurKannada.description: A calligraphic serif font with strong stroke contrast. Named after Belur, a city in Karnataka.

Benne.author: John Harrington
Benne.description: A Kannada text font developed for better digital reading experiences, especially on mobile devices.

Chalukya.author: Ki Basajan Ki
Chalukya.description: Free Kannada font developed by Ki Basajan Ki

Cheluvi.author: Tejaswi
Cheluvi.license: Free for personal and commercial use

DevamaNew.author: T K Sadananda
DevamaNew.description: A contemporary Kannada typeface designed for readability.

Ganga.author: Ki Basajan Ki
Ganga.description: Free Kannada font developed by Ki Basajan Ki

Gok-Kannada-Fonts.author: Government of Karnataka
Gok-Kannada-Fonts.description: Free fonts provided by Government of Karnataka.

Gubbi.author: Aravinda VK
Gubbi.description: Kannada Unicode font forked from Kedage with improvements. A handwriting-style font.

Hoysala.author: Ki Basajan Ki
Hoysala.description: Free Kannada font developed by Ki Basajan Ki

Hubballi.author: Erin McLaughlin
Hubballi.description: A monolinear typeface with informal, friendly appearance for Kannada and Latin scripts.

Inchara.author: P L Udaykumar
Inchara.license: Free for personal and commercial use
Inchara.description: A Kannada display font with bold styling.

KPRao.author: K P Rao
KPRao.license: Free for personal and commercial use
KPRao.description: A Kannada font for text and display use.

Kadamba.author: Ki Basajan Ki
Kadamba.description: Free Kannada font developed by Ki Basajan Ki

KannadaPixel.author: Shankar Sivarajan
KannadaPixel.description: A pixel style Kannada font designed for digital displays and retro styling.

Karnata-F-Kittel-Font.author: Prashant Pandit (Project Head), Sachin Shetty (Graphics), Satish A.G. (Technical)
Karnata-F-Kittel-Font.description: Digital revival of Basel Mission Press Mangalore typeface (1830-1900), named after lexicographer Ferdinand Kittel. Designed for OCR training and Kannada revival fonts research.

Kedage.author: Indian Institute of Science
Kedage.description: Kedage typeface developed at the Indian Institute of Science, Bangalore.

KohinoorKannada.author: Satya Rajpurohit
KohinoorKannada.description: An all-around Kannada font for software engineers and branding specialists, featuring open letterforms.

Kuvempu-Praja.author: NLCI
Kuvempu-Praja.description: A font family for Kannada text, part of NLCI font collection.

Lohit-Kannada.author: Lohit Fonts Project
Lohit-Kannada.description: Lohit Kannada font designed to cover Kannada script, commissioned by Red Hat.

LavaKannada.author: Ramakrishna Saiteja
LavaKannada.description: A typeface designed for magazine use, handling large quantities of text with ease. Extremely legible at small sizes, sophisticated at large sizes. 4 weights. Designed in collaboration with Parimal Parmar.

Lava-Kannada.author: Ramakrishna Saiteja
Lava-Kannada.description: A typeface designed for magazine use, handling large quantities of text with ease. Extremely legible at small sizes, sophisticated at large sizes. 4 weights. Designed in collaboration with Parimal Parmar.

November-Kannada.author: Peter Biľak, Veronika Burian, Joost Krikhaar
November-Kannada.description: A highly accessible and legible typeface family for signage and information systems, handling long texts with ease. Features distinctive orthogonal end strokes. Available in 9 weights.

NovemberStencil-Kannada.author: Peter Biľak, Veronika Burian, Joost Krikhaar
NovemberStencil-Kannada.description: A heavy-duty stencil typeface with playful layering styles. Inspired by industrial signage, gives a unique flavour to short texts and provides possibilities for colour typography and motion graphics. Available in 9 weights.

October-Kannada.author: Peter Biľak, Veronika Burian, Joost Krikhaar
October-Kannada.description: A warm, geometric typeface with soft corner terminals. A rational, utilitarian font family with rounded stroke endings lending it a friendlier character. Useful for signage, branding, headlines and editorial purposes. Available in 9 weights.

Malige.author: Indian Institute of Science
Malige.description: Kannada font developed at IISc. Fork of original Kannada fonts for improvements.

Murty-Kannada.author: Murty Classical Library of India
Murty-Kannada.description: A font designed for scholarly publications of classical Kannada texts.

Nishchaya.author: Kishore Chandra
Nishchaya.description: A contemporary Kannada typeface with elegant curves, designed for readability and modern aesthetics.

Navilu.author: Aravinda VK
Navilu.description: A Kannada handwriting font forked from Mallige with improvements.

Nirmala-UI.author: Microsoft
Nirmala-UI.description: Nirmala UI font by Microsoft with Kannada support.

NotoSansKannada-Unhinted.author: Jelle Bosma - Monotype Design Team
NotoSansKannada-Unhinted.description: A sans-serif font designed for comprehensive language support across Kannada script.

NotoSerifKannada-Unhinted.author: Google
NotoSerifKannada-Unhinted.description: A serif font for Kannada script with comprehensive language support.

Nudi-Fonts.author: Kannada Ganaka Parishat
Nudi-Fonts.description: Official Nudi fonts recommended by the Government of Karnataka for Kannada text.

NovemberKannada.author: Peter Biľak, Veronika Burian, Joost Krikhaar
NovemberKannada.description: A highly accessible and legible typeface family for signage and information systems, handling long texts with ease. Features distinctive orthogonal end strokes. Available in 9 weights.

NovemberStencilKannada.author: Peter Biľak, Veronika Burian, Joost Krikhaar
NovemberStencilKannada.description: A heavy-duty stencil typeface with playful layering styles. Inspired by industrial signage, gives a unique flavour to short texts and provides possibilities for colour typography and motion graphics. Available in 9 weights.

OctoberKannada.author: Peter Biľak, Veronika Burian, Joost Krikhaar
OctoberKannada.description: A warm, geometric typeface with soft corner terminals. A rational, utilitarian font family with rounded stroke endings lending it a friendlier character. Useful for signage, branding, headlines and editorial purposes. Available in 9 weights.

PRAKASHAK.author: PRAKASHAK Team
PRAKASHAK.license: Free for personal and commercial use
PRAKASHAK.description: A Kannada font for publishing and text use.

Padyakke-Libre.author: Mohan B所能
Padyakke-Libre.description: A contemporary Kannada typeface designed for readability and versatility.

Praja.author: NLCI
Praja.description: A Kannada typeface developed by NLCI for official use.

Raavi.author: Punjabi University
Raavi.description: A Unicode Kannada font originally from Punjabi University.

SakalBharati.author: C-DAC GIST Pune
SakalBharati.description: A Unicode-based OpenType font supporting 13 Indic scripts including Kannada. A mono-thick font with equal horizontal and vertical stem thickness.

SamaKannada.author: Maithili Shingre, Vaijayanti Ajinkya
SamaKannada.description: Sama is a mono linear typeface with rounded terminals, featuring genial curves that gently billow its forms. Released in 2018 with 6 weights. A proprietary font from Ek Type.

Shreelipi.author: Modular Infotech
Shreelipi.description: Shreelipi Kannada font developed by Modular Infotech.

Sriraju.author: Sugata Srinivasaraju
Sriraju.license: Free for personal and commercial use
Sriraju.description: A unicode typeface family with six weights (Regular, Regular Italic, Bold, Bold Italic, Stencil/Outline, Stencil/Outline Italic). Released on 28 November 2017 to commemorate the 75th birth anniversary of C Srinivasaraju (28 November 1942 - 28 December 2007).

Hind Mysuru.author: iT Foundry
Hind Mysuru.description: A Kannada font designed for screen reading. Part of the Hind font family adapted for Mysuru/Karnataka.

HindMysuru.author: Liang Hai
HindMysuru.description: A clean and legible sans-serif typeface designed for Kannada script, with a modern and friendly appearance.

nlci-knda-badami.author: NLCI
nlci-knda-badami.description: A clean and legible Kannada font family designed for reading and display, with regular, italic, bold and bold italic weights.

NLCI-Kaveri.author: NLCI
NLCI-Kaveri.description: A contemporary Kannada typeface with elegant proportions, designed for readability. Features Regular, Italic, Bold, and Bold Italic weights.

Kanishka.author: Kishore Chandra
Kanishka.description: A contemporary Kannada display font with elegant calligraphic style.

Tiro-Kannada.author: John Hudson, Fiona Ross
Tiro-Kannada.description: A serif typeface designed for classical Kannada texts, with generous proportions and traditional forms.

Sampige.author: Indian Institute of Science
Sampige.description: A Kannada font developed at IISc for the Kannada Localization Initiative.

Gajamukha.author: M S Dayananda
Gajamukha.license: Free for personal and commercial use
Gajamukha.description: A Unicode-compliant Kannada font with elegant calligraphic style.

SandurKannada.author: Sandur
SandurKannada.license: Free for personal and commercial use
SandurKannada.description: A Kannada font designed for display and text.

korkki.author: Ko Ro Ki
korkki.description: A creative Kannada font with unique style.

Kolar.author: Ramakrishna Saiteja, Shiva Nallaperumal
Kolar.description: A multi-script serif typeface family for Kannada and Latin, designed for long-form reading.

Tunga.author: Raghunath Joshi, Vinay Saynekar
Tunga.description: A Unicode Kannada font designed by Microsoft for UI and screen use.

KarnataGTN.author: Arun C Kallappanavar, Vaishnavi Murthy, Omshivaprakash H L, Abhaya Simha, GTN family
KarnataGTN.description: A variable Kannada typeface based on the handwriting style of G. T. Narayan Rao. Bridges handwritten expression and formal typography, creating a balance between natural writing and readable text.

Karnata-German-Mission-Press.author: Arun C Kallappanavar, Vaishnavi Murthy, Omshivaprakash H L, Abhaya Simha
Karnata-German-Mission-Press.description: Digital revival of a historical Kannada typeface from German Mission Press prints. A revival font project for Kannada from German Mission Press prints in Mangaluru.

Karnata-Wesleyan-Mission-Press.author: Arun C Kallappanavar, Vaishnavi Murthy, Omshivaprakash H L, Abhaya Simha
Karnata-Wesleyan-Mission-Press.description: Digital revival of a historical Kannada typeface from Wesleyan Mission Press prints. A revival font project for Kannada from Wesleyan Mission Press prints in Bengaluru and Mangaluru.

Designiga-Handwriting.author: Shashwat Hegde Tyagi (@designiga_kannada)
Designiga-Handwriting.description: A handwriting style Kannada font by Shashwat Hegde Tyagi.
